# The Real Stig

> The Real Stig is a free multiplayer browser racing game that runs in the browser. Players create room links, race friends online, and chase faster lap times on the all-time leaderboard.

Use the homepage as the primary source of product and gameplay information.

Important notes:

- The main playable experience lives on the homepage.
- Shared room links may include a `?room=` query parameter, but the canonical public URL is the homepage.
- Multiplayer rooms, live room state, and leaderboard updates require JavaScript.

## Primary

- [Homepage](https://therealstig.com/): Main landing page and playable game client.
- [Sitemap](https://therealstig.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical list of public indexable URLs.
- [Robots](https://therealstig.com/robots.txt): Crawl directives and sitemap reference.

## Optional

- [Social preview image](https://therealstig.com/social-preview.png): Social sharing preview image for the game.
